name: YAKSHA

abilities.name: Demise (Flickering Ember)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, make a Lamp marker within 2" of this model.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

abilities.name: Verdant Wrath
abilities.text: After this model receives a raise while resisting a (m) attack, deal 1 damage to its attacker.

actions.name: Wyrdwood Weapons
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with severe terrain, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: ...and Roses
triggers.text: One ally engaged with the target heals 1.

triggers.name: Mark the Way
triggers.text: Make a Lamp marker within 2" of the target.

actions.name: Nature Spirit
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range in base contact with a piece of terrain or Lamp marker.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' designation
